item.title: QmidiCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: QmidiCtl [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]
item.description:
QmidiCtl

QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
QmidiCtl
(Music Production)
QmidiCtl is a MIDI remote controller application that sends MIDI data over the network, using UDP/IP multicast. Inspired by multimidicast (https://llg.cubic.org/tools) and designed to be compatible with ipMIDI for Windows (https://nerds.de).
QmidiCtl has been primarily designed for the Maemo enabled handheld devices, namely the Nokia N900 and also being promoted to the Maemo Package repositories. Nevertheless, QmidiCtl may still be found effective as a regular desktop application and as an Android application as well.

QmidiCtl is free, open-source software, distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.

Sourceforge project page: https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmidictl

Weblog: https://www.rncbc.org

See also: QmidiNet - A MIDI network gateway via UDP/IP multicast
https://qmidinet.sourceforge.io
[read more]

item.title: TrustVare EML to PST Converter Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: TrustVare EML to PST Converter Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: trustvare
item.itunes:summary:
TrustVare EML to PST Converter Software
(Utilities)
TrustVare EML to PST Converter Software is an effective tool crafted to ensure the smooth conversion of EML files into PST format. The strong capabilities and easy design of this application help users to have an excellent time. EML to PST Converter Tool is convert Bulk/Large Windows Live Mail into PST file format without any data loss. The software guarantees data integrity during the conversion process by preserving email original structure and information. With its advanced filtering choices, this utility lets users convert emails just depending on parameters like date range and assigned folders. It also offers a preview choice so consumers can look over the material before the conversion. Providing a customizable solution for email migration needs, the application is compatible with all versions of Windows and MS Outlook as well as EML files from many email clients including Windows Live Mail, Thunderbird, Apple Mail, etc. Users are free to investigate the app for free in the demo version.
A grate Features of the EML to PST Exporter: -

Perform a conversion from EML to PST.
There is no size restriction.
Exporting EML in bulk to Microsoft Outlook
Provide support for EML files across all email clients.
View the EML file together with its attachments.
All versions of Microsoft Outlook and Windows operating systems are compatible.
A filtering option

Visit here: https://www.trustvare.com/eml/pst/
[read more]

[read more]

TrustVare EML to PST Converter Software is an effective tool crafted to ensure the smooth conversion of EML files into PST format. The strong capabilities and easy design of this application help users to have an excellent time. EML to PST Converter Tool is convert Bulk/Large Windows Live Mail into PST file format without any data loss. The software guarantees data integrity during the conversion process by preserving email original structure and information. With its advanced filtering choices, this utility lets users convert emails just depending on parameters like date range and assigned folders. It also offers a preview choice so consumers can look over the material before the conversion. Providing a customizable solution for email migration needs, the application is compatible with all versions of Windows and MS Outlook as well as EML files from many email clients including Windows Live Mail, Thunderbird, Apple Mail, etc. Users are free to investigate the app for free in the demo version.

item.title: Qt6Gtk2 [Qt Components]
item.itunes:title: Qt6Gtk2 [Qt Components]
item.itunes:author: trialuser
item.itunes:summary:
Qt6Gtk2
(Qt Components)
Qt6Gtk2 - GTK+2.0 integration plugins for Qt6
[b]Requirements[/b]
- GNU Linux or FreeBSD
- qtbase >= 6.0.0 (with private headers)
- GTK+ 2.0
- libX11

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://github.com/trialuser02/qt6gtk2/releases[/url]
[read more]
item.description:

item.title: Fingrom [Financial]
item.itunes:title: Fingrom [Financial]
item.itunes:author: vlyskouski
item.itunes:summary:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

Features:
- Accounting
- Budget Categories
- Bills, Transfers, Incomes (Invoices)
- Goals Definition
- Exchange rates
- Metrics
- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File
- Import from CSV, QIF, OFX files for Bills and Invoices
- Data encryption
- Localization
- Responsive and Adaptive Design
- Shortcuts

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]
item.description:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

Features:
- Accounting
- Budget Categories
- Bills, Transfers, Incomes (Invoices)
- Goals Definition
- Exchange rates
- Metrics
- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File
- Import from CSV, QIF, OFX files for Bills and Invoices
- Data encryption
- Localization
- Responsive and Adaptive Design
- Shortcuts

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

Features:
- Accounting
- Budget Categories
- Bills, Transfers, Incomes (Invoices)
- Goals Definition
- Exchange rates
- Metrics
- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File
- Import from CSV, QIF, OFX files for Bills and Invoices
- Data encryption
- Localization
- Responsive and Adaptive Design
- Shortcuts

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]

item.title: Android Tweaker Performance App [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: Android Tweaker Performance App [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: modulesx
item.itunes:summary:
Android Tweaker Performance App
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Android Tweaker is a powerful module that optimizes your Android device's kernel and RAM for a perfect balance between performance and battery life. Users can apply recommended settings to enhance multitasking, memory management, and gaming experience while extending battery life. The module supports EAS/HMP kernels, monolithic/hybrid architectures, and provides a simple optimization solution for all Android devices. Compatible with all ROMs, kernels, and processors, universal!

[read more]
item.description:
Android Tweaker Performance App
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Android Tweaker is a powerful module that optimizes your Android device's kernel and RAM for a perfect balance between performance and battery life. Users can apply recommended settings to enhance multitasking, memory management, and gaming experience while extending battery life. The module supports EAS/HMP kernels, monolithic/hybrid architectures, and provides a simple optimization solution for all Android devices. Compatible with all ROMs, kernels, and processors, universal!

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Android Tweaker Performance App
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Android Tweaker is a powerful module that optimizes your Android device's kernel and RAM for a perfect balance between performance and battery life. Users can apply recommended settings to enhance multitasking, memory management, and gaming experience while extending battery life. The module supports EAS/HMP kernels, monolithic/hybrid architectures, and provides a simple optimization solution for all Android devices. Compatible with all ROMs, kernels, and processors, universal!

item.title: XvM Performance Tweaker App [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: XvM Performance Tweaker App [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: modulesx
item.itunes:summary:
XvM Performance Tweaker App
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
• One Click Overclocking
• CPU Booster
• GPU Tweaks
• V,Z Ram
• netTweaks+

Tweak CPU (Frequency, Governor, Voltage, Hotplug) and GPU (Frequency, Governor), the I/O Scheduler, Low Memory Killer, and Virtual Memory.

You can manually set & Change governor as per your preference like Performance - Battery & One Tap to overclock your cpu
[read more]

• V,Z Ram
• netTweaks+

Tweak CPU (Frequency, Governor, Voltage, Hotplug) and GPU (Frequency, Governor), the I/O Scheduler, Low Memory Killer, and Virtual Memory.

You can manually set & Change governor as per your preference like Performance - Battery & One Tap to overclock your cpu

item.title: Greeting Cards Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Greeting Cards Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: businesscard
item.itunes:summary:
Greeting Cards Software
(Office Apps)
Worried about how to create attractive folded greeting for your friends and family members? Visit company www.businesscardmakersoftware.com website which offers Greeting Cards Software for making distinct greeting cards using objects including picture, pencil, arc, triangle, star, line, ellipse etc. Successful design greeting cards application makes versatile greetings of types including ellipse, rounded, rectangular, CD/DVD shapes and operates in compatible manner with Windows 11, 10, 8 etc.

[read more]
